---
title: "personaRegistry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/personaRegistry.ts"
loc: 56
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.55
style_score: 4.04
intel_score: 4.86
overall_score: 5.15
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `PersonaRegistry`
- `PersonaRegistry`
- `root`
- `configPath`
- `configData`
- `data`
- `personaStr`
- `message`
- `upper`
- `activePersona`
- `activePersona`
